title: Luffy Breaks Kuro’s Perfect Plan
description: On pages 11–14, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: No, get me a small boat

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Huh? A boat!?

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: The captain left all by himself. What is he doing?

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: He's heading to the Marines alone... is he trying to turn himself in?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They've stopped attacking, and there's been no movement over there

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Maybe they killed the captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Steer the boat over! Man the cannons! Everyone, prepare for battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Ah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: All... All the Marines...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: are dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let's start the plan...

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: even- though he's our captain...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: His power still brings shivers down my spine

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yeah... the oppo- Nents were well- trained marines...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Oh...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: You're not dead yet...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: You've got quite a nice face

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I won't beg for my life

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: If you're want to kill me, then do it now!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Your jaw is broken...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Yet you still can say such crap

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I'm impressed

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I shall reward you with the head of "The 100 Plans KURO"

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
